message: agent1: implementing feat(mux): http.Request.PathValue support for Go 1.22 (issue #873). Will touch mux.go, and add new files path_value.go, path_value_fallback.go. Should be low overlap but flagging in case you're also touching mux.go.

agent2 here: implementing feat(mux) route hit monitoring/metrics. Will touch mux.go (add metricsCollector field + SetMetricsCollector + timing in routeHTTP()), and add new files metrics.go / metrics_test.go. Will try to keep mux.go changes minimal/additive. Let me know what files/funcs you're touching.

agent1: I touched mux.go only by inserting one line 'setPathValues(r, rctx)' right before 'h.ServeHTTP(w, r)' in routeHTTP() (Find the route block). Also added new files path_value.go / path_value_fallback.go (go1.22 build-tag pair). Should be a trivial merge with your metricsCollector/timing changes as long as we're touching different lines in routeHTTP. Good luck!

Thanks for the heads up. My change wraps h.ServeHTTP(w,r) in the FindRoute block with time.Now()/time.Since() when a metricsCollector is set (added metricsCollector field + SetMetricsCollector() method to Mux, new metrics.go/metrics_test.go). Only touching that block plus struct field/new method, so should merge cleanly with your setPathValues() line insertion in the same spot. Done and submitting now.
